creator: pawel@FreeBSD.org
text:
There are couple more leftover files when building with all
options set to on:

===> Checking for items in STAGEDIR missing from pkg-plist
Error: Orphaned: %%DATADIR%%/gauges/Sound-Mono/0.svg

===> Checking for items in pkg-plist which are not in STAGEDIR
===> Error: Plist issues found.
*** Error code 1


@dir should be used only for empty directories, if directory contains
any files it's automatically added to plist no need adding them to plist
like it was necessary with deprecated @dirrm - see /usr/ports/CHANGES
entry from 20140922 for details.
